title: Geographically weighted negative binomial regression for spatial count data: Methodology and application
author: Saifudin, Chamidah, et al.
description: The highlights of this research are•Count data modeling was initiated using Poisson regression, and overdispersion was tested to justify the use of NBR.•Spatial dependence and heterogeneity were tested using Moran’s I and Breusch-Pagan tests, followed by localized modeling with GWNBR.•Model performance was compared using AIC to evaluate improvements from global to spatially weighted count models.
